markdown.markdown: - Use the **search box** (top right) to search across all columns. - Use the **column filters** (under each header) to filter specific fields. - Helpful search terms to try: - Variant type: `missense`, `nonsense`, `frameshift`, `splice_site`, `inframe_ins`, ``` inframe_del``inframe_indel ``` - Protein region: `N_tail`, `N_finger`, `spacer`, `C_finger`, `C_tail` - Origin: `germline`, `somatic`, `mixed` - Database IDs: `ClinVar`, `All_of_Us`, `gnomAD`, `COSMIC` - HGVS: `c.`, `p.`, or a position like `345` or `354` - Tip: You can combine terms in the global search (e.g., `C_finger missense`). ```{=html} ``` ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ```{r} library(readr) library(dplyr) library(DT) variants <- read_csv( "data/gata2_variants_v1_2025-12-19.csv", show_col_types = FALSE ) # Columns to hide by default hide_idx <- 0:4 # Long-text columns to truncate long_cols <- intersect(c("clinical_refs", "functional_refs", "associated_phenotype"), names(variants)) long_idx <- match(long_cols, names(variants)) - 1 long_idx <- long_idx[!is.na(long_idx)] # remove any NA targets safely # Build columnDefs safely coldefs <- list() if (length(hide_idx) > 0) { coldefs <- append(coldefs, list(list(visible = FALSE, targets = hide_idx))) } if (length(long_idx) > 0) { coldefs <- append(coldefs, list(list( targets = long_idx, width = "260px", render = JS( "function(data, type, row, meta) {", " if (type !== 'display' || data === null) return data;", " data = data.toString();", " var short = data.length > 70 ? data.substr(0, 70) + '…' : data;", " return '' + short + '';", "}" ) ))) } DT::datatable( variants, filter = "top", options = list( pageLength = 25, lengthMenu = list(c(25, 50, 100, 250, -1), c("25", "50", "100", "250", "All")), scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE, columnDefs = if (length(coldefs) == 0) NULL else coldefs ) ) ```
markdown.srcMarkdownNoYaml: ## How to use the explorer - Use the **search box** (top right) to search across all columns. - Use the **column filters** (under each header) to filter specific fields. - Helpful search terms to try: - Variant type: `missense`, `nonsense`, `frameshift`, `splice_site`, `inframe_ins`, ``` inframe_del``inframe_indel ``` - Protein region: `N_tail`, `N_finger`, `spacer`, `C_finger`, `C_tail` - Origin: `germline`, `somatic`, `mixed` - Database IDs: `ClinVar`, `All_of_Us`, `gnomAD`, `COSMIC` - HGVS: `c.`, `p.`, or a position like `345` or `354` - Tip: You can combine terms in the global search (e.g., `C_finger missense`). ```{=html} ``` ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ```{r} library(readr) library(dplyr) library(DT) variants <- read_csv( "data/gata2_variants_v1_2025-12-19.csv", show_col_types = FALSE ) # Columns to hide by default hide_idx <- 0:4 # Long-text columns to truncate long_cols <- intersect(c("clinical_refs", "functional_refs", "associated_phenotype"), names(variants)) long_idx <- match(long_cols, names(variants)) - 1 long_idx <- long_idx[!is.na(long_idx)] # remove any NA targets safely # Build columnDefs safely coldefs <- list() if (length(hide_idx) > 0) { coldefs <- append(coldefs, list(list(visible = FALSE, targets = hide_idx))) } if (length(long_idx) > 0) { coldefs <- append(coldefs, list(list( targets = long_idx, width = "260px", render = JS( "function(data, type, row, meta) {", " if (type !== 'display' || data === null) return data;", " data = data.toString();", " var short = data.length > 70 ? data.substr(0, 70) + '…' : data;", " return '' + short + '';", "}" ) ))) } DT::datatable( variants, filter = "top", options = list( pageLength = 25, lengthMenu = list(c(25, 50, 100, 250, -1), c("25", "50", "100", "250", "All")), scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE, columnDefs = if (length(coldefs) == 0) NULL else coldefs ) ) ```
